change_summary: Added a required, explicitly-formatted machine-checkable [pathway: <...>] tag for every factor line (including missing data) with examples, directly fixing the zero pathway-tag-coverage failures.

Added an explicit one-field-to-one-tagged-line rule, clarified that headers/narrative never carry the tag, and added a mandatory pre-output self-check counting input fields vs. tagged lines to eliminate the recurring under-coverage of pathway tags.
